## Task coverage

- [ ] Linked task or issue is referenced
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Tests added or updated where practical

## Verification

- [ ] `cmake --preset debug`
- [ ] `cmake --build --preset debug`
- [ ] `ctest --preset debug`
- [ ] Packaging/release flow checked, if this touches CPack or GitHub Actions release assets

## Screenshots or logs

Attach screenshots for UI changes and paste relevant logs for transport, MCP, or packaging changes.

## Risk notes

Mention any compatibility, security, release, or migration risks.
